news.summary: A recent real-world study revealed a noticeable decrease in severe bleeding and transfusion requirements among coronary artery bypass graft (CABG) patients taking the blood thinner ticagrelor when paired with CytoSorbents therapy. The analysis, conducted on May 22, 2025, in Princeton, New Jersey, showcased statistically significant results. The corporation at the helm of this advancement, CytoSorbents Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as CTSO, has been a pioneer in this field. This finding demonstrates a positive impact on patient outcomes, marking a promising development in the medical sphere.
news.headline: CytoSorbents therapy reduces bleeding in CABG patients on Ticagrelor; Significant decrease shown in EuroPCR 2025.

news.summary: New York, May 22, 2025 - Arena Investors, LP, a leading global institutional asset manager, proudly disclosed that the third vintage of their multi-strategy fund and related vehicles have massively surpassed the fundraising goal. The fund managed to draw in investments from a diverse group of global institutional investors, showcasing the growing interest in their offerings. This success indicates the confidence and trust that investors have in Arena's strategies, with the fund attracting substantial capital from around the world. The achievement underscores Arena's position as a preferred choice for investors seeking strong returns and strategic investment opportunities.
news.headline: Arena announced the closure of its third flagship Special Opportunities Fund, which exceeded its fundraising target, attracting capital from global institutional investors.

news.summary: A previous high-ranking executive from the CIA and an expert from Apple have been enlisted to assist in the advancement of Strider's unique AI-driven intelligence platform, Spark. The company, known for delivering top-tier strategic intelligence solutions, revealed this update on May 22, 2025, in Salt Lake City.
news.headline: Former CIA executive Anthony DeMario joins Strider as EVP to develop AI-powered intelligence engine Spark. Salt Lake City, May 22, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 22, 2025, Cyient Limited, a global company specializing in Intelligent Engineering solutions, appointed Kavita Kurup as their new Chief People Officer (CPO). Kavita will be leading the Human Resources responsibilities from the company's base in Hyderabad, India. This strategic appointment is aimed at enhancing the workforce management at Cyient Limited and signifies a key development in their organizational structure.
news.headline: Kavita Kurup appointed Chief People Officer of Cyient, a global engineering solutions company. Hyderabad-based.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Eggs Up Grill, a rapidly expanding "better breakfast" spot, made significant strides by launching five new locations, finalizing three agreements, and securing six commitments. These commitments comprise multi-unit contracts and the brand's forthcoming introduction into the Pennsylvania market.
news.headline: Eggs Up Grill expands with 5 new locations, 3 deals signed, approaching Pennsylvania market debut. #Growth #Breakfast

news.summary: Conventional techniques remain prevalent in finance, yet there is a gradual uptake of emerging technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, and advanced analytics. As of May 22, 2025, in New York and Montvale, N.J., there has been a rise in interest in these innovative tools. While traditional methods still dominate the sector, AI and advanced analytics are showing promising early results, with slow but increasing adoption rates. This shift signifies a changing landscape in finance and highlights the potential benefits of integrating these cutting-edge technologies.
news.headline: Deloitte, IMA survey shows AI gaining traction in cost acc & profit reporting, despite slow adoption. (85 chars)

news.summary: Unisys, a technology company based in Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, has recently been acknowledged for its top-notch technology and innovative solutions. The company has been recognized for its Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) framework and quantum risk assessments. Unisys was designated as a leader in the 2025 Attack Surface Management (ASM) report by a global analyst. This recognition highlights the company's expertise in managing security threats and staying ahead in the constantly evolving tech landscape. As a publicly traded company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol UIS, Unisys continues to demonstrate its commitment to excellence in the technology sector.
news.headline: Unisys (NYSE: UIS) named leader in 2025 Attack Surface Management report for technology and risk assessment.

news.summary: Collaborative articles shed light on the practical, technological, and structural impacts for exchanges, clearing houses, and CSDs following the transition to T+1, marking one year since implementation. The series delves into the foreseeable future as international markets contemplate analogous changes. This initiative originates from Stockholm and was released on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Vermiculus partners with GreySpark Partners for T+1 Settlement insights, explores implications for exchanges globally.

news.summary: A partnership has been announced on May 22, 2025, in Bridgewater, N.J., where Firstsource Solutions Limited, a prominent global provider of solutions and services (NSE:FSL) (BSE:532809) and a part of RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group, has joined forces with Sanas. Sanas is renowned for its real-time speech technology.
news.headline: Firstsource and Sanas partner to enhance customer interactions with AI; Firstsource is global leader, NSE:FSL, BSE:532809.

news.summary: The summer season sees a notable 20% rise in teenage traffic fatalities, with an average of 7 deaths daily, according to reports. Commencing with Memorial Day weekend, this period dubbed "the 100 deadliest days" by safety specialists marks a significant spike in accidents among teen drivers.
news.headline: National Road Safety Foundation urges young drivers & parents to prioritize safety during summer; 20% increase in teen traffic deaths, averaging 7 daily.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed several recalls in partnership with certain companies. The recalls involve Nezmdi Infant Swings due to a suffocation hazard, posing a significant risk of serious injury or even death. Consumers are urged to visit www.cpsc.gov for more information on the recalls.
news.headline: CPSC recalls Nezmdi Infant Swings due to suffocation risk. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more info. Stay safe!

news.summary: A design firm recently released a report on their AIA 2030 Commitment, showcasing anticipated energy consumption data for over 4 million square feet of projects. This data highlights the possibility of achieving excellent performance on a significant scale. The report was made public on May 22, 2025, from LPA Design in Irvine, California.
news.headline: LPA reduced energy use by 76.2% in 2024 across 4 million sq ft projects, showing high performance on large scale.

news.summary: On May 20, 2025, Pictor, a prominent provider of multiplex proteomics solutions, declared the opening of its U.S. base in Carlsbad, California. This move signifies a major step in their expansion plans and dedication to furthering advancements in the field.
news.headline: Pictor, a global leader in proteomics, opens U.S. HQ in California; boosting operations amid regulatory changes.

news.summary: Lake Victoria Gold Ltd., represented by USA News Group, released a news commentary on May 22, 2025, in Vancouver, BC. The commentary discusses the recent impressive performance of major gold producers. Concerning institutional coverage and market focus on the record-setting quarters of large gold producers, attention is drawn towards a potentially lucrative opportunity in the gold sector that may be less prominent but equally promising. This alternative perspective suggests a different outlook on the gold market, hinting at substantial potential growth.
news.headline: Gold producers hitting record-setting quarters. Contrarian Capital eyeing next wave of gold market growth.

news.summary: TotalEnergies SE announced the opening of its largest solar power complex in Europe near Seville, Spain. The cluster consists of five solar farms with a total capacity of 263 megawatts. These facilities are projected to produce 515 gigawatt-hours of renewable energy per year, sufficient to power over 150,000 homes in Spain and reduce carbon emissions by approximately 245,000 tons annually. The company plans to sell most of the electricity generated through long-term power purchase agreements (PPAs), while the rest will be available on the wholesale energy market.
news.headline: TotalEnergies opens Europe's largest solar complex in Spain, with 263MW capacity to power 150,000 homes and reduce carbon emissions by 245,000 tons/yr.

news.summary: On Thursday, Rio Tinto plc (NYSE: RIO) announced that CEO Jakob Stausholm will be stepping down from his position later this year. Stausholm, who initially joined the company in 2018 as executive director and CFO, assumed the CEO role in January 2021. Rio Tinto Chair Dominic Barton commended Stausholm for his leadership in rebuilding trust with key stakeholders. Barton emphasized that the company's strategic priorities remain constant, with a focus on enhancing operational performance to maximize asset potential. Additionally, Rio Tinto revealed plans to commence preliminary activities for expanding production at the Amrun bauxite mine in Far North Queensland. Bitcoin also hit a milestone by surpassing $111,000.
news.headline: Rio Tinto CEO Jakob Stausholm stepping down as company launches $1.9B bauxite expansion plan; aims for greater operational performance.

news.summary: Clothing company V.F. Corporation (NYSE: VFC) released its fourth-quarter results, revealing an adjusted earnings per share of a 13-cent loss, surpassing the anticipated 14-cent loss. Despite this positive outcome, the quarterly sales stood at $2.14 billion, showing a 5% decline compared to the previous year and falling short of the expected $2.18 billion. President and CEO Bracken Darrell expressed satisfaction with the progress of VF's transformation process, highlighting the successful achievement of cost reduction and balance sheet strengthening goals by FY25. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: VF Corp reported Q4 EPS of 13 cents loss (beating street view of 14 cents loss) and $2.14B in sales (down 5% YoY). CEO highlights progress in transforming the company.

The report, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, predicts that this market is anticipated to skyrocket to US$15.9 billion by 2030, indicating a significant growth rate of 39.8% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and forecasts, equipping stakeholders with valuable insights to make informed decisions.
news.headline: Global market for Generative Artificial Intelligence in Animation was $2.1B in 2024, projected to reach $15.9B by 2030 with CAGR of 39.8%. - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: A new report on Distributed Performance and Availability Management Software has been released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for this software was worth US$6.9 billion in 2024. It is expected to increase to US$10.2 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.5% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, driving factors, and future forecasts.
news.headline: Global market for Distributed Performance and Availability Management Software valued at US$6.9B in 2024, projected to reach US$10.2B by 2030, growing at 6.5% CAGR - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency and NFTs are being touted as tools to protect against currency debasement, with industry leaders emphasizing the importance of investing in digital assets. Raoul Pal, founder of Global Macro Investor, highlights the significance of owning crypto and NFTs, stating that they are undervalued and serve as a long-term store of wealth. Nicolai Sondergaard from Nansen notes the wealth preservation aspect of NFTs and the potential for art to become a vehicle for the wealthy. Digital artist Beeple made headlines by selling an NFT artwork for $69 million, while the largest NFT collection, CryptoPunks, has seen a decline in value. Despite the current bearish trend, experts predict a resurgence in NFT market momentum post-Bitcoin profits rotation, with a potential peak in early 2026. The market could see a perfect storm in 2030, with various factors contributing to NFT ownership becoming equivalent to owning a brand. However, the previous NFT bull run was largely driven by metaverse speculation, which is less prominent in the current cycle. DISCLAIMERS: The article does not provide investment advice, and all investments carry risks. Readers are advised to conduct their research before making decisions.
news.headline: Protect purchasing power with crypto & NFTs amid currency debasement, says experts. NFTs are a top wealth store; Art NFTs gain youth acceptance. Beeple's NFT sold for $69M. CryptoPunks down 59% from peak, may recover in 2026 post-Bitcoin peak profits rotation. NFT market peak likely in Q1 2026, maturing for 2030 boom. Prior NFT bull run driven by metaverse speculators. Conduct independent research before investing.

news.summary: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) recently revealed plans for a substantial $2.1 billion at-the-market (ATM) offering for its preferred stock Strife (NASDAQ: STRF), demonstrating the company's commitment to enhancing its capital structure and maintaining a focus on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) related securities. CEO Fong Lee and Executive Chairman Michael Saylor announced this during a company webcast. Lee highlighted that the decision was influenced by the strong performance of their fixed income instruments, stating, "We observe market liquidity and demand for our instrument. Our confidence in executing a $2.1 billion ATM offering moving forward is high." Strife's preferred stock features a lucrative 10% coupon.
news.headline: Strategy Inc. revealed $2.1B At-The-Market Program to acquire more Bitcoin through preferred stock Strife; focusing on BTC securities. CEO and Executive Chairman announced news during webcast on strong fixed income performance.

Yuan expressed satisfaction with the results, stating, "We delivered another solid quarter, exceeding guidance in both revenue and profitability — a testament to the strength of our platform and AI-first innovation." Amidst economic uncertainty, customers are increasingly relying on Zoom for...

news.summary: The Sui ecosystem witnessed a significant decline in token values following a major oracle exploit, resulting in the draining of liquidity pools totaling $200 million.
news.headline: $200M oracle exploit shakes Sui ecosystem, causing largest DEX to lose liquidity and tokens value plummet.

news.summary: The U.S. House narrowly passed President Donald Trump's $3.8 trillion tax-cut bill, with a 215-214 vote, causing the yield on 30-year Treasury bonds to surge to 5.15%, the highest since October 23, 2023. All Democrats and two Republicans voted against the bill. If enacted, the bill would enact broad tax cuts, increase spending, and increase the deficit trajectory by trillions over the next decade. JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon expressed concerns about the bill's impact on America's fiscal path, stating that it could lead to a large and growing deficit. The bill now moves to the Senate where a vote is expected before the July 4th recess.
news.headline: House passes Trump's tax bill by 215–214, 30-year yields hit 5.15%, raising concerns over debt sustainability.

news.summary: The article discusses the importance of agricultural practices that promote carbon sequestration for sustainable development in the face of climate change. Biofertilizers, living microbial products that enhance soil fertility, are highlighted for their carbon sequestration benefits while reducing reliance on chemical fertilizers. They work by enhancing soil's ability to capture and store carbon through various mechanisms, such as stimulating the formation of soil aggregates and producing glycoproteins that bind soil particles together. Research shows that agricultural soils treated with biofertilizers can sequester an additional 0.5-1.0 ton of carbon per hectare annually compared to conventionally managed soils. The global biofertilizers market is growing rapidly due to increasing demand for sustainable agriculture practices.
news.headline: Biofertilizers boost carbon sequestration in agriculture by 0.5-1.0 ton/ha yearly, offering sustainable, resilient solutions.

news.summary: In Phoenix, Western Alliance Bank revealed the launch of Phase I of Sierra Flats, an 80-unit housing development in Carson City, Nevada. The project, featuring affordable and workforce housing, secured funding from Western Alliance Bank and R4 Capital Funding. The bank extended a $14.0 million construction loan and a $2.50 million permanent loan to kickstart Sierra Flats at 3410 Butti Way.
news.headline: Western Alliance Bank funds 80 affordable apartments in Carson City, NV, providing $14M construction loan and $2.5M permanent loan.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, PPG (NYSE: PPG) shared updates on their progress towards achieving their near-term 2030 sustainability goals. This includes a focus on reducing greenhouse gas emissions across their operations and value chain, as well as boosting sales of sustainably advantaged products due to increased customer interest. Peter Votruba-Drzal, Vice President of Global Sustainability at PPG, highlighted the significance of sustainability in their business strategy. This effort emphasizes the company's commitment to sustainability and corporate growth.
news.headline: PPG reports progress towards 2030 sustainability goals; includes GHG reductions & uptick in green product sales.

news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Index experienced a decline following the passing of President Donald Trump's tax bill in the House. Conversely, shares of the artificial intelligence company Snowflake saw a significant increase in value due to favorable earnings. The Dow Jones fell in response to this development, while Snowflake's stock soared. This news update was reported in Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones falls after Trump tax bill, while AI stock Snowflake rises on earnings news.

news.summary: The UK's Court of Appeal partially dismissed a lawsuit by Bitcoin SV investors against major crypto exchanges, including Binance, for delisting the token in 2019. Investors under a sub-class B were not entitled to over 8.9 billion British pounds ($11.9 billion) in speculative damages based on BSV's growth potential as the court found the cryptocurrency had reasonably similar substitutes. The court ruled that investors had opportunities to mitigate losses by selling or reinvesting in other crypto assets, dismissing the "loss of a chance" argument. Binance also sought to dismiss a $1.76 billion lawsuit by the FTX estate, attributing FTX's collapse to internal fraud, not external manipulation.
news.headline: UK court partially dismisses Bitcoin SV investors' $11.9B lawsuit against Binance over delisting, rejecting claims of missed profit opportunities. Binance won legal battle.

news.summary: The article discusses the concept of staking in blockchain technology, where users become network operators and are rewarded for running the blockchain. Noam Nisan, a researcher at StarkWare, explains that staking provides security through computer science guarantees and economic disincentives for bad behavior. The article also touches on the comparison between proof-of-work and proof-of-stake mechanisms, highlighting trade-offs in cost, control, and decentralization. Nisan delves into how fee mechanics and inflation controls maintain balance in the ecosystem. The full conversation is available on The Clear Crypto Podcast and Cointelegraph's Podcasts page, Apple Podcasts, or Spotify.
news.headline: Staking promotes trust in blockchains without energy consumption. Learn how it works and why it's important in cryptocurrencies. Tune in to The Clear Crypto Podcast for more on staking with a top computer scientist. Listen on Apple Podcasts or Spotify.

news.summary: His Excellency Ahmed Al-Khateeb, the Minister of Tourism in Saudi Arabia, unveiled TOURISE, a groundbreaking global tourism platform designed to shape the future of the industry for the next five decades.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia launches TOURISE platform to redefine global tourism, led by Minister of Tourism Ahmed Al-Khateeb.
